eyebrow: Publication hub • workflow-first • no fake-free fluff
intro: AUXSAYS is a modern resource hub focused on real free AI tools, sharper production systems, automation that actually saves time, and LMS workflows that scale.
coverage_sub: App-first tool guides, production systems, lightweight automation, and training infrastructure that holds up under real use.

cards.title: Free AI Tools
cards.summary: App-specific breakdowns of tools that are genuinely usable without hidden export traps or fake-free bottlenecks.

cards.title: Content Workflows
cards.summary: Repeatable pipelines for thumbnails, edits, automation, publishing, and repurposing content with less friction.

cards.title: Automation Productivity
cards.summary: Practical scripts, prompts, and tool chains that save time without becoming another maintenance burden.

cards.title: LMS Training Systems
cards.summary: Systems-minded guidance drawn from real instructional design, Moodle administration, reporting, and workflow architecture.
